title: HOTFIX: Silver Heron — Crash fixes + mod cleanup
changes: Fixed client crash: MineColonies onPlaySoundEvent accessing config before loaded (IllegalStateException)
Disabled FancyMenu early menu music to prevent race condition with mod config loading
Removed Hexerei — was causing 404 sync failures and client tick crashes (removed from client, server, and manifest)
Removed Mekanism Turrets — incompatible with Mekanism 10.7.18 API (NoSuchMethodError on TileEntityTypeDeferredRegister)
Removed tzp_vanilla_bridge — server-side mod was spawning hostile 'Nightmare Mode' skeleton patrols near players
Full VPS mod sync — server now matches client at 195 mods (was running stale mod set)

title: Massive Balance Overhaul + 21 New Mods + Loot & EMC Expansion
changes: --- NEW MODS (21 total, 2 removed in 1.1.9a) ---
Twilight Forest — full adventure dimension with boss progression (Naga, Lich, Hydra, Ur-Ghast, and more)
Ars Nouveau — complete spellcasting system with source gems, spell books, and enchanting apparatus
Steam 'n' Rails — Create rail expansion with new track types, stations, and locomotives
Chipped — 6,973 decorative block variants via mason's table workbenches
Born in Chaos — dozens of new hostile mobs that spawn at night for variety and challenge
Universal Enchants — all enchantments can be applied to all gear types (sword enchants on axes, etc.)
Better Weaponry — new weapon types including halberds, spears, daggers, and battleaxes via Better Combat
ImmediatelyFast + Dynamic FPS — client-side rendering and idle performance optimizations (especially for iGPU/laptop players)
Curios API, Lootr, Explorer's Compass, Bosses of Mass Destruction, 4x YUNG's Better Structures, Friends & Foes, Toasty's Mobs, Traveler's Compass, Puzzles Lib
--- COMBAT & BALANCE ---
Iron Golems completely overhauled: 1,000 HP (10x), 20 armor, 6x movement speed, 20x attack speed, half size, permanent Regeneration I — they are now fearsome guardians
MineColonies guards buffed to 15x damage and 15x health — your colony guards can now hold their own
MineColonies raids massively buffed: difficulty 8, up to 100 raiders per wave, raids every 7-10 nights — true siege warfare
Disease nearly eliminated (5% of vanilla rate) — colonists stay healthy
Mowzie's Mobs buffed to 10x health and 5x damage — boss encounters are now epic and dangerous
Mowzie spawn weights doubled across all biomes with increased group sizes
Vanilla hostile mob spawn weights reduced 60-75% (zombies, skeletons, spiders, creepers) — less spam, more meaningful encounters
Zombie reinforcement mobcap enforced — no more infinite zombie horde stacking
Monster mobcap reduced from 70 to 50 with slower spawn interval — better server performance and less mob spam
--- LOOT TABLES ---
44 custom loot table overrides — modded items now appear in ALL structure chests
Vanilla dungeons, mineshafts, and villages: Create alloys, Mekanism steel, Ars Nouveau source gems, Farmer's Delight knives
Strongholds, temples, nether fortresses: AE2 crystals, Twilight Forest ironwood/steeleaf, Mystical Agriculture essences, IE steel
End cities and woodland mansions: Draconic Evolution draconium, supremium essence, Gobber ingots, Philosopher's Stone
YUNG's Better Strongholds, Dungeons, Desert Temples, and Nether Fortresses all have tiered modded loot
Twilight Forest structure chests include cross-mod loot from the full modpack
--- EMC / TRANSMUTATION ---
19,720 total EMC entries across 80+ mod namespaces (up from 3,102 in v1.1.8)
Full coverage: Create (892), Chipped (6,973), Steam 'n' Rails (1,048), Twilight Forest (751), IE (741), Macaw's Furniture (717)
New mod EMC: Born in Chaos (183 items), Better Weaponry (171 items)
All previously-gapped namespaces filled: Integrated Dynamics (81), Nether's Exoticism (73), Mystical Agradditions (47), Mowzie's Mobs (42)
--- QUESTS ---
Complete quest overhaul — 116 quests across 6 chapters (up from 18)
New Twilight Forest chapter: 19 quests with full boss progression chain (Naga > Lich > Hydra > Ur-Ghast)
Tech path: 25 quests covering Create, Mekanism, IE, AE2, Extreme Reactors, Steam 'n' Rails, Industrial Foregoing
Magic path: 18 quests for ProjectE, Ars Nouveau, EvilCraft, Mystical Agriculture, Apotheosis
Exploration path: 19 quests spanning Twilight Forest, Undergarden, BOP biomes, bosses, Nether, and End
Building path: 15 quests for MineColonies, Chipped, Macaw's, Handcrafted, Storage, with Master Builder capstone
Onboarding: 18 quests — guided new player experience from first wood to choosing your path
--- PERFORMANCE ---
ServerCore dynamic performance scaling enabled — automatically adjusts view distance, mob caps, and chunk ticking based on server TPS
Zombie reinforcement and spawner mobcaps now enforced — prevents entity spam lag
Fast biome lookups and duplicate fluid tick cancellation enabled
Chunk loading lag prevention enabled — smoother experience when exploring
--- FIXES ---
Fixed Biomes O' Plenty ocelot biome modifier crash — disabled broken bop_ocelot spawner that was crashing the server
Fixed Iron Golem buff crash — moved attribute overrides from KubeJS startup to datapack (KubeJS runs too early for entity attributes)
--- SERVER ---
Deploy script now includes automatic player warning countdown before restarts (30s with broadcasts, kicks, and save-all)
Old TZP-bot service verified removed from VPS — no more random mob spawning

title: Visual Overhaul + Modpack Manager + Balance Pass
changes: Launcher is now a modpack manager — syncs mods/configs, creates a TZP profile in the official Minecraft launcher, and launches it automatically
New dark theme with blue accents across the entire website and launcher UI (inspired by Cursor/Warp.dev)
Removed particle effects, glass/transparency, and animated gradients for a cleaner look
MineColonies: disease 10x rarer, guards buffed to 5x damage and 5x health
Modded mob spawns fixed — Mowzie's Mobs datapack weights boosted 5-6x, spawn rates increased across all mob types
Added tzp_mob_spawns datapack — custom spawn rules for modded mobs across all biomes
Added 1,185 new EMC entries across 12 mods (total: 3,102) — xnet, minecolonies, Macaw's mods, upgrade_aquatic, and more
server.properties excluded from VPS deploy — prevents test values overwriting production config
Added TZP infrastructure documentation — full runbook for VPS, CI/CD, and deployment
Release tag verification added to CI — builds now fail if the Git tag does not match APP_VERSION
Windows Java 21 detection expanded with glob-based scanning for all major JDK distributions
Fixed Windows MC launcher detection — added CurseForge bundled path, MSIX scanning, removed Bedrock URI fallback
Fixed manifest hash field mismatch — launcher now supports both sha256 and hash keys for backwards compatibility

title: Java Fix + Live Log
changes: Fixed NeoForge install failing on macOS — now passes explicit Java 21 path instead of falling back to system Java
Added live Log tab for real-time launcher/update/install event debugging
Pack sync is now explicit — no more auto-download on startup

title: VPS Migration + CI/CD Pipeline
changes: Migrated server from PebbleHost to OVH VPS (15.204.117.31) — dedicated 6-core 12GB server with full SSH/root access
Built GitHub Actions CI/CD pipeline — pushing to TZP-server main auto-deploys to VPS via rsync + systemd restart
Added 15-second in-game countdown with chat broadcasts before every server restart — no more surprise disconnects
Added automatic save-all before every stop/restart — prevents inventory loss on restart
JVM tuning: G1GC with optimized heap, region sizing, and pause targets for modded MC
server.properties tuning: view distance, simulation distance, and entity tracking optimized
Added RCON console access script for remote server management
Fixed CI/CD rsync deleting world data — world/ directory now properly excluded from sync
Added reset-failed recovery to systemd service for automatic restart after crashes

title: World Gen + EMC + Quest Polish
changes: Fixed Biomes O' Plenty ocelot biome modifier crash — disabled broken bop_ocelot spawner
Rebalanced TerraBlender world generation — vanilla biome regions now favored over BoP to reduce biome spam
Fixed ProjectE custom_emc.json format — EMC entries were silently failing due to incorrect array structure
Fixed Blueprint data map override — must set replace:true or overrides get ignored
FTB Quests polished — quest paths, descriptions, and reward tables cleaned up
KubeJS title screen script added — custom TZP branding on main menu
KubeJS tips integration — modded gameplay tips appear on loading screens
Server world reset performed — fresh generation with corrected world gen weights
Enabled allow-flight in server.properties — jetpacks and creative flight now work without kicks

title: Pack Parity + Infrastructure
changes: Full config parity sync between client and server — all mod configs now match
Added MineColonies colony management documentation and tips
Added Refined Storage patch sources and config references
Built SFTP deploy scripts for PebbleHost (pre-VPS migration)
Added pull-sftp-log.sh for remote log fetching and error scanning
Mowzie's Mobs spawn datapack weights verified and documented

title: Custom Launcher + AI Overhaul
changes: TZP Launcher: Custom launcher replaces CurseForge distribution
Website dashboard with bug reports, crash reports, and patch notes
Claim code auth system for dashboard access
Manifest-based modpack sync with SHA256 verification
Fixed diamond/netherite zombie spam from NightmareMode
Fixed AFK disconnect (/afk now prevents idle kick)
Added 595 EMC entries (up from 8)
3 new performance mods: C2ME, Noisium, ServerCore
Hard difficulty enabled
11 FTB Quest chapters added

title: Initial Release
changes: Initial release: 172 mods on NeoForge 1.21.1
MadGod AI companion with RCON + HTTP bridge integration
MineColonies, Mekanism, Create, ProjectE, Gobber, and more
Custom TZP Vanilla Bridge mod for server integration
Mowzie's Mobs with custom biome spawn datapacks
